keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Panama 0, Mexico 1. Jesús Gallardo (Mexico) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
Luis Romo (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ozziel Herrera (Mexico) is shown the yellow card.
Alberto Quintero (Panama) is shown the yellow card.
Julián Araujo (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Panama 0, Mexico 1.
Johan Vásquez (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Aníbal Godoy (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
